parameters.query: SELECT DISTINCT ON (o.id) 'tracker' as src, o.id, COALESCE(o.agency, 'Unknown') as agency, COALESCE(o.dept, 'Other') as dept, COALESCE(o.dept, 'Other') as level_1, 'Department of War' as level_2, o.level_3, o.opp_title, o.source_url, o.programs_json::text as programs_json, o.program_count, o.synced_at::text as synced_at, o.govtribe_id, o.naics_code, o.set_aside, o.eis_fit_score, o.needs_score, o.financials_score, o.ooda_score, o.ai_analysis, o.data_source, o.solicitation_number, o.response_deadline::text as response_deadline, o.place_of_performance, o.last_refreshed::text as last_refreshed, o.estimated_value, o.stage, o.gda_score, o.gda_label, o.incumbent_analysis, o.likely_competitors, o.eligible_vehicles, o.sb_qualified, o.assigned_ou, CASE WHEN cp.opp_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_capture_plan FROM gda_opportunity_tracker o LEFT JOIN gda_capture_plans cp ON cp.opp_id = o.id WHERE o.stage NOT IN ('No-Bid','Cancelled','No-Go','Lost','Won') ORDER BY o.id, o.gda_score DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT 'alert' as src, 0 as id, agency, 'Department of War' as dept, 'Department of War' as level_1, NULL as level_2, NULL as level_3, name as opp_title, source_url, '' as programs_json, 0 as program_count, posted_date::text as synced_at, govtribe_id, naics_code, set_aside_type as set_aside, fit_score as eis_fit_score, NULL::numeric as needs_score, NULL::numeric as financials_score, NULL::numeric as ooda_score, '' as ai_analysis, source as data_source, solicitation_number, due_date::text as response_deadline, '' as place_of_performance, posted_date::text as last_refreshed, NULL::bigint as estimated_value, 'Identified' as stage FROM opportunity_alerts WHERE (due_date IS NULL OR due_date >= NOW()) ORDER BY fit_score DESC LIMIT 100
UPDATE gda_opportunity_tracker SET stage = '{{ $json.stage }}' WHERE id = {{ $json.opp_id }} RETURNING id, stage

INSERT INTO gda_capture_lessons (opportunity, agency, naics_code, stage_from, stage_to, outcome, lesson_text) SELECT $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, CASE WHEN $5 IN ('Won') THEN 'WON' WHEN $5 IN ('Lost') THEN 'LOST' WHEN $5 IN ('No-Go') THEN 'NO-GO' ELSE 'STAGE_CHANGE' END, 'Stage changed from ' || $4 || ' to ' || $5 || ' for ' || $1 WHERE $5 IN ('Won','Lost','No-Go','Pursuing','Proposal','Submitted');

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ target: ('OPP-' + $('Validate Stage').first().json.opp_id), target_type: 'program', session_id: 'auto_pursue_' + ($('Validate Stage').first().json.opp_id || Date.now()) }) }}

={{ (() => { const opp_id = $('Validate Stage').first().json.opp_id || 'Unknown'; const ooda = $('Call OODA Auto').first()?.json || {}; const summary = ooda.summary || ooda.observe_summary || 'OODA analysis queued'; const rec = ooda.decide_recommendation || '-'; const conf = ooda.confidence_score || '-'; const acts = (ooda.act_immediate || []).slice(0,3).join('
* '); const msg = 'NEW PURSUE OPP
Opp ID: ' + opp_id + '

OODA Auto-Analysis
Rec: ' + rec + ' | Conf: ' + conf + '%
BLUF: ' + summary.substring(0,200) + '

Immediate Actions:
* ' + (acts || 'See full OODA in GDA Command') + '

https://gda.csr-llc.tech'; return JSON.stringify({ chat_id: 8631035943, message: msg }); })() }}
